case_title: JAMES ZBORALSKE VS. ALEX KULIKOV et al

docket_entries.description: SUBPOENA DUCES TECUM ISSUED TO SERGIO LOPEZ-36704 BURDICK ST. NEWARK CA 94560

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-29-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-29-2013 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL.APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: M. GOODMAN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $55.89) SERVED MAR-11-2013, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT DOMUS DESIGN GROUP LLC

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ZBORALSKE, JAMES RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KULIKOV, ALEX DOMUS DESIGN GROUP LLC $7,289.32 PRINCIPAL, $186.78 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,476.10, DEFENDANTS SHALL PAY PLAINTIFF: CONCURRENTLY WITH PAYMENT OF THIS JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF SHALL RETURN TO DEFENDANT AT HIS REQUEST ALL OF THE MATERIALS USED TO FABRICATE THE CUSTOM CABINETS AND DRAWERS THAT ARE SUBJECT OF PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
MINI MINUTES FOR JUN-05-2013 09:00 AM FOR DEPT 525
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM AND ORDER FILED BY KULIKOV, ALEX ZBORALSKE, JAMES KULIKOV, ALEX

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT APPELLANT KULIKOV, ALEX DOMUS DESIGN GROUP LLC RECOVER FROM RESPONDENT ZBORALSKE, JAMES $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $75.00, JUDGMENT IS IN FAVOR OF APPELLANT, ALEX KULIKOV,ETAL AND AGAINST RESPONDENT, JAMES ZBORALSKE.TOTAL JUDGMENT$75.00. THE JUDGMENT ON APPEAL IS FINAL AND REPLACES THE SMALL CLIAMS JUDGMENT OF APRIL 29, 2013. NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND CERTIFICATE OF MAILING FILED

Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Appellant,Alex Kulikov appear as pro per; Respondent, James Zboralske appears as pro per with witnesses, Sergio Lopez and Jesus Lopez. Parties sworn, testify in the narrative and respond to questions from Judge Flesig.
